title: ajuga × hybrida
intro: Ajuga × hybrida, also known as bugleweed or Ajuga, is a hybrid plant belonging to the Lamiaceae family, derived from the cross between Ajuga reptans and Ajuga genevensis. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and thyroid problems, due to its ability to interact with thyroid hormone receptors. The health benefits of Ajuga × hybrida include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce stress and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Ajuga × hybrida, such as teas and tinctures, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
